items.name: Hades-II-Trainer
items.description: 🛡️ Hades-II-Trainer is a powerful trainer for Hades II that lets you customize your gameplay experience. Features include God Mode, infinite health, unlimited mana, one-hit kill, speed hack, resource editing (Darkness, Keys, Nectar, Ambrosia), and more. Supports latest version on Steam and Epic Games Store. For educational purposes only.
